output.summary: Two changes: (1) Replace btn-tertiary with btn-primary on the external link button in both TSX and PHP. (2) Remove the useTopicColor attribute entirely — delete it from block.json, remove the ToggleControl from TSX, remove the conditional accent color class from the section element in both TSX and PHP, and remove the $first_accent_color / firstAccentColor variables and related accent color fetching logic.

fileChanges.description: Remove useTopicColor attribute and its example entry
fileChanges.details: Delete the 'useTopicColor' key from attributes object. Remove 'useTopicColor' from example.attributes.

fileChanges.description: Remove useTopicColor logic and change button to btn-primary
fileChanges.details: 1. Remove 'useTopicColor' from EventHeroAttributes type. 2. Remove the entire 'categoryAccentColors' useSelect block (lines 163-177) that fetches accent colors for categories. 3. Remove the 'firstAccentColor' variable derivation (lines 179-181). 4. Remove the useTopicColor ToggleControl from InspectorControls (lines 207-215). 5. In the section's useBlockProps className, remove the conditional '[firstAccentColor]: attributes.useTopicColor && !!firstAccentColor' — simplify to just 'event-hero hero relative overflow-visible'. 6. Change 'btn-tertiary' to 'btn-primary' on the external link button (line 321). Note: keep the per-pill accent color logic intact — that is independent of useTopicColor and applies per-category colors to individual pills.

fileChanges.description: Remove useTopicColor logic and change button to btn-primary
fileChanges.details: 1. Remove '@var bool $useTopicColor' from docblock. 2. Remove lines 35-36 that compute $first_category and $first_accent_color. 3. In theme_block_props() call, remove the '$first_accent_color => $useTopicColor && ...' conditional — simplify to just 'event-hero hero relative overflow-visible'. 4. Change 'btn-tertiary' to 'btn-primary' on the external link <a> element (line 179).

attributeChanges.name: useTopicColor
attributeChanges.description: Removed entirely — no topic color gradient override functionality

designDecisions.decision: External link button uses btn-primary (filled charcoal button with gradient hover) instead of btn-tertiary (text link with arrow)
designDecisions.evidence: User requested: 'Use primary button style instead of btn-tertiary'

designDecisions.decision: Remove useTopicColor attribute and all associated logic (accent color fetching for section gradient, ToggleControl, conditional class on section). Per-pill accent colors on individual category pills remain unchanged.
designDecisions.evidence: User requested: 'Remove the useTopicColor attribute and all topic color override functionality entirely'
